description_long: This is a freestanding induction cooker with a rectangular form factor, featuring a metallic body and a hinged lid that covers the cooktop when closed. The cooktop has four circular burners arranged in a grid, each with a corresponding control knob located on a horizontal control panel at the front. Below the cooktop, there is a large oven compartment with a black glass door and a horizontal handle for opening. The sides and back of the cooker are plain and metallic, with no visible vents or additional features. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and durability, suitable for use in residential or communal urban environments.
description: A metallic induction cooker with four burners, a front control panel with knobs, and a large oven compartment below. The design is functional and robust, with a hinged lid and a black glass oven door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four burners, control knobs, oven door with handle, and the open lid.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain metallic side and the open lid, with burners partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless metallic back and the closed oven compartment.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the open lid and burners visible from the side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the front, just below the cooktop, and features four evenly spaced rotary knobs aligned horizontally. There are no visible digital displays, labels, or indicator lights.
